nasb.text: You shall not give any of your offspring to offer them to Molech, nor shall you profane the name of your God; I am the Lord.

esv.text: You shall not give any of your children to offer them to Molech, and so profane the name of your God: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 你不可把你的子孫獻給摩洛，也不可褻瀆你　神的名；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 不可把儿女当作祭物献给假神摩洛，不可亵渎你上帝的名。我是耶和华。
